name: Cursor inbox poll (idle exit)
description: Checks .cursor-inbox for dropped tasks. Replies IDLE and stops when empty — cheap cron guard. Foreman mailbox requires a local session; this automation only reads the file inbox.

prompts:
Inbox poll only — minimal tokens.

1. List files in .cursor-inbox/ with extensions .md, .txt, or .msg. Ignore README, .gitkeep, and anything under processed/.
2. If there are no such files: reply exactly the single word IDLE and stop. Do not read other paths or explore the repo.
3. For each inbox file: read it, execute the request, then move the file to .cursor-inbox/processed/ (create that folder if needed).
4. Summarize what you did in 3–8 lines.
